proposal_summary: This proposal increases the MaticX Supply Cap on Polygon v3 from 8.6M units to 17.2M units.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Increase the Supply Cap from 8.6M units to 17.2M units
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Increases the allowed supply cap for MaticX on Aave v3 Polygon to 17,200,000 to enable more deposits and SD rewards.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal involves a single parameter update (SupplyCap) for an existing asset.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal will increase the Supply Cap from 8.6M units to 17.2M units.

limitations: Does not specify exact function names used to enact the parameter change, though typical pool configrator actions are implied.
